about.title: About Our Parish
about.description: Sacred Heart Korean Catholic Church of Connecticut is a community that grows together, sharing God's love and grace. We welcome everyone and practice love and peace within the teachings of Christ.
about.description2: Our parish is located in Wethersfield, Connecticut, and is dedicated to serving the local community and spreading the Gospel. We look forward to walking the journey of faith with you.
